results.reply: Pricing depends on volume, geography, and the rails you want to use. At $50M/month in the EU, that would likely be a custom setup, so happy to walk through it on a 30-min call and give you a clearer view of fit and pricing: https://calendly.com/ivy-sales/discovery

Totally fair question. If it’s useful, the reason teams look at Ivy is that we’re built specifically for crypto exchange pay-ins and pay-outs, with faster, cheaper rails like SEPA Instant, ACH, FPS, and cards. If you want, I can share a quick side-by-side on a 30-minute discovery call: https://calendly.com/ivy-sales/discovery

Thanks for the note. I don’t want to overstate anything here since I don’t have a verified product fact in front of me on GBP Open Banking support. If helpful, I can confirm with our team and come back to you, or you can grab a slot here and we can walk through the setup live: https://calendly.com/ivy-sales/discovery
